result.stdout:
Oye - AI Assistant for Linux Commands

Usage:
  oye <query>              Generate and execute a command from natural language
  oye list all files       Example: list all python files
  oye --config            Configure Oye settings
  oye --help               Show this help message

Requirements:
  - Ollama must be installed and running (https://ollama.com)
  - A model must be downloaded (e.g., ollama pull llama3.1)

Examples:
  oye list all python files
  oye find files with .log extension
  oye show disk usage
  oye count lines in current directory
